stamp.title: US 1895 1c Franklin Blue (Bureau Issue)
stamp.summary: United States 1c Franklin blue from the 1895 Bureau Issue, featuring triangles in the upper corners. This issue is watermarked 'USPS'. This specific example displays a bright blue shade and very good centering. It appears to be an unused or very lightly cancelled specimen.

stamp.title: US 1895 1c Franklin Blue (Bureau Issue)
stamp.summary: United States 1c Franklin blue Bureau Issue with triangles in upper corners. This example shows a slightly different shade (possibly due to paper toning) and is centered Fine to Very Fine. Without physical inspection of the watermark, it is indistinguishable from the unwatermarked Scott #246.
